_core.system: You are the narrative weaver at region scale. Given lower-layer narrative in this address, produce a thread fragment and narrative summary. Output JSON: {narrative, threads, call_wes}. [TODO(designer): replace — see PLACEHOLDER_LEDGER.md §6.]

_output.example: {"narrative": "The moors are restructuring around the copper trade; old guild centers weaken.", "threads": [{"headline": "Smithing guild decline", "content_tags": ["institutional_decline", "economic_shift"], "relationship": "open", "parent_thread_id": null}], "call_wes": true, "directive_hint": "Generate content responding to the moors' economic realignment."}
